# The Charlie WeHo building packet

## Snapshot
- Building ID: the-charlie-weho-7617-santa-monica-blvd
- Address: 7617 Santa Monica Blvd, West Hollywood, CA 90046
- Primary URL: https://thecharlieweho.com/
- Management company: Greystar
- Recommended status: research_complete
- Last updated: 2026-03-22

## Scorecard
- Quiet: 3 (low, evidence count 1)
- Management: 3 (low, evidence count 1)
- Amenity: 4 (medium, evidence count 2)
- Community stability: 3 (low, evidence count 1)
- Location fit: 5
- Pricing transparency: 3

## Risks
- Structural noise risk: unknown
- Location noise risk: medium
- Security risk: unknown
- Pricing risk: medium

## Evidence summary
- [official] The official site continues to market a modern West Hollywood community close to dining and nightlife. Source: The Charlie WeHo official site (https://thecharlieweho.com/). Note: Official copy markets modern West Hollywood living near dining and nightlife.
- [review] Apartments.com currently shows 0 reviews, which leaves resident-operations evidence very thin. Source: Apartments.com (https://www.apartments.com/the-charlie-weho-west-hollywood-ca/clgxc7f/). Note: The public profile showed 0 reviews.
- [official] Greystar’s current page confirms that homes are actively leasing under the operator’s platform. Source: Greystar property page (https://www.greystar.com/the-charlie-weho-west-hollywood-ca/p_20735). Note: Greystar continues to list live availability and pricing.

## Open questions
- Confirm access control, EV charging, package handling, and review depth as more residents move in.

## Notes
Research complete but still too thin to advance. The location is attractive and the operator is known, but the visible review base is effectively zero and key operational details remain under-documented.
